benefits.title: Why Join PUBLIC NEWS 1?
benefits.subtitle: We provide our reporters with the best tools, recognition, and financial rewards in the industry.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.desc: Join thousands of other reporters who are changing the way news is delivered to the public. Your press ID is just a few steps away.

faq.q1: What is the registration fee used for?
faq.a1: The registration fee covers the cost of background verification, processing your documents, and issuing your official Digital Press ID and physical card delivery.
faq.q2: How long does the verification process take?
faq.a2: Once you submit your application and complete the payment, our backend team verifies your documents. This process typically takes 24 to 48 business hours.
faq.q3: How do I earn money as a reporter?
faq.a3: Reporters earn money through a performance-based model. You receive payouts based on the number of verified news stories you submit, overall engagement (views, shares), and bonuses for exclusive coverage.
faq.q4: Can I upgrade or renew my Press ID later?
faq.a4: Yes! Your initial registration provides platform access for 1 year. You can renew your ID directly from your Reporter Dashboard before it expires.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about joining our network.
